name: WC26 AI Predictor
description: Live AI match predictor for FIFA World Cup 2026. Per-player ratings (0–10) with reasoning, scoreline predictions, and tactical analysis. Claude Sonnet primary, Groq fallback, $5 hard budget cap. Built to explore Spec Driven Development with Zod.

name: ResumeSummariser
description: AI-powered resume summariser that extracts key information and generates structured summaries using LLMs.

name: DevOpsProject
description: Production-ready Helm chart deployment with Redis on Amazon EKS, fully provisioned with Terraform.

name: gitcommitsummary
description: CLI tool that summarises Git commit history into readable changelogs and diff reports.
